semantic.role: View producer that generates a change impact report by analyzing dependency graph impact radii.
responsibilities: Load the knowledge graph from disk using fs/path.
Compute change impact (blast radius) for each module via the changeImpact engine function.
Filter out modules with zero impact and sort entries by totalAffected descending.
Render a Markdown report with a table showing total affected, depth breakdown, and rules affected for each module.
Save the view artifact and Markdown through ctx.outputManager.
outOfScope: Direct mutation of the knowledge graph or dependency graph.
invariants: Impact calculation relies on the pre-computed knowledge graph under .spine/view/data/knowledge-graph.json.
Each module in the report must have an entry in the knowledge graph.
Depth values are capped at 3; if the impact cone exceeds depth 3, the entry is flagged as truncated.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Integrate dependency graph analysis into the view system by providing a dedicated producer for change impact reports.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Built as part of the view-producer refactor to migrate legacy view logic into modular, service-owned subsystems.

publicSurface.description: Exports a ViewProducer component that generates the change impact Markdown report for the ArchSpine view system. Consumed by view-registry to populate the change-impact view.
